description: You are a freelance mixing engineer preparing an approval draft for a client who hasn't paid their final invoice. Create an audio watermark to protect your work by mixing the music track /home/ga/Audio/client_delivery/piano_mix.wav (on a track named 'Piano Mix') with the vocal snippet /home/ga/Audio/client_delivery/watermark.wav (on a track named 'Watermark'). The watermark must be placed at exactly 0:05.000, 0:15.000, and 0:25.000. Adjust the 'Piano Mix' gain to -4 dB and the 'Watermark' gain to +2 dB. Export the final mix to /home/ga/Audio/client_delivery/preview_mix.wav and save the Ardour session.
